name: git-review
description: Summarise GitHub activity and generate commit messages with AI, powered by the git-review CLI.

gitReview.githubToken.markdownDescription: GitHub personal access token. Required for private repositories and to avoid rate limits. Equivalent to the `GITHUB_TOKEN` environment variable.

gitReview.openaiApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenAI API key used for AI summarisation and commit-message generation. Equivalent to the `OPENAI_API_KEY` environment variable.

gitReview.openaiBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Custom OpenAI-compatible API base URL (e.g. `http://localhost:11434/v1` for Ollama). Equivalent to the `OPENAI_BASE_URL` environment variable.

gitReview.defaultRepo.markdownDescription: Default GitHub repository in `owner/repo` format used when the **Review Repository** command is run without prompting. Equivalent to the `GITREVIEW_REPO` environment variable.

gitReview.defaultOwner.markdownDescription: Default GitHub owner (user/org) for owner-only review runs. Used when `gitReview.defaultRepo` is empty.

gitReview.reviewAuthor.markdownDescription: Optional commit author filter for **Review Repository**. Passed to the CLI as `--author`.

gitReview.model.markdownDescription: LLM model to use for all AI operations (summarisation, commit-message, issue generation). Equivalent to the `GIT_REVIEW_MODEL` environment variable.

gitReview.defaultDays.markdownDescription: Number of days to look back when running **Review Repository** without an explicit date range.
